title: SignClick
description: A full-grown capitalism plugin. Allowing players to create countries, vote and decide policies. Players are able to create companies, buy and sell stocks and so on.
body:
SignClick is a plugin to simulate capitalism on your minecraft server. This Minecraft plugin originated in early 2022. It started as a system to allow players to teleport to another location by pressing a sign and paying the provided amount of currency. Now the plugin has expanded to a full-grown capitalism plugin. Allowing players to create countries, vote and decide policies. Raising taxes and leading your country to a rich future. Players are able to create companies, buy and sell stocks on the custom stock market. Producing your own products and license products from another company. Dependencies: [Vault](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/vault)
Soft Dependencies: [Dynmap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/dynmap) & [EssentialsX](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx) By using /country , you can interact with your country, this allows you to add people, change taxes, hold elections, and set policies. By using /company , you can manage companies, buying and selling shares. It also allows you to make special netherite armor, with (patent upgrades) bonuses. Patents are gains by a patent upgrade auction. By using /party , you can deal with political parties belonging to a country. # Capitalism System Need help? Consider using **'/company guide'** Using Signs, you can make teleportation possible for a price. The money spend will be provided to the player or company who created the sign. Teleportation signs can be made as a player or as a company. You can buy and sell shares. Use your influence to decide who will fill the board seats of this company. As a company you can produce items, with a production machine. You can only produce a select amount of items, these items are considered products. You have 3 ways to acquire a product: 1. Research a product: In the company menu you can choose to research a specific product. The resource cost depends on the research speed. If you want to research your product faster, it increases the cost. 2. Craft a product: Using the other already unlocked products you can create new products, for which the cost depends on the cost of the resource products. 3. Product License: You can request a license from another company who has the product, in trade offering weekly payment, or royalty fees. Create a custom machine to start producing your products # Governance System Need help? Consider using **'/country guide'** Set policies as a country and take power using the political party system.
